source_discovery_method: derive tenant/board identifier from company ATS URL, then use the public JSON endpoint when available
list_fetch_method: bounded GET/POST to source JSON list endpoint through the source runner
detail_fetch_method: Not required for core fields; retrieve-job endpoint can enrich questions/pay transparency.
pagination_method: Single list response with jobs[] and meta.total.
canonical_url_rule: Use absolute_url and strip fragments/tracking query params while preserving gh_jid/job id.
source_job_id_rule: preserve strongest raw id or URL id; Use absolute_url and strip fragments/tracking query params while preserving gh_jid/job id.
title_company_rule: reject rows missing title, company context, or usable canonical/apply URL; reject placeholders and blank titles
location_text_rule: list-payload: location.name exposes source geo text.
country_region_city_rule: list-payload: location.name exposes source geo text.
remote_type_rule: Infer from title/location/description evidence; Greenhouse does not expose a universal remote flag.
posting_date_rule: Use updated_at, then first_published when present.
rate_limit: default per-host serialization plus source daily budget; lower for uncertified tenants

quality_threshold.public_write_rule: accepted rows must pass title/company/canonical_url and row-level quality gate

known_failure_modes: prospect posts with null internal job id

runner_interface.writeAccepted: source runner accepted path updates public read model only after validation
runner_interface.writeQuarantine: source runner quarantine path records reason and keeps row out of public index

next_action: audit raw payloads and add field-specific parser/backfill fixture
